en: Arise, shine, for your light has come, and the glory of the LORD has risen upon you.
zh: 錫安哪！起來，發光，因為你的光已經來到， 耶和華的榮耀已升起來照耀你。

en: For behold, darkness shall cover the earth, and thick darkness the peoples; but the LORD will arise upon you, and his glory will be seen upon you.
zh: 看哪！黑暗遮蓋大地， 幽暗遮蔽萬民； 但耶和華要升起來照耀你， 他的榮耀要彰顯在你身上。

en: And nations shall come to your light, and kings to the brightness of your rising.
zh: 萬國要在你的光中行走， 列王必在你如旭日初升的光輝中行走。

en: Lift up your eyes all around, and see; they all gather together, they come to you; your sons shall come from far, and your daughters shall be carried on the hip.
zh: 你舉目四面觀看吧！ 眾人都聚集，來到你那裡； 你的兒子都要從遠方而來， 你的女兒都必被懷抱而來。

en: Then you shall see and be radiant; your heart shall thrill and exult, because the abundance of the sea shall be turned to you, the wealth of the nations shall come to you.
zh: 那時，你看見了，就必有光彩， 你的心又驚訝又寬暢； 因為大海的財富都必轉來歸你， 列國的財富也都歸你。

en: A multitude of camels shall cover you, the young camels of Midian and Ephah; all those from Sheba shall come. They shall bring gold and frankincense, and shall bring good news, the praises of the LORD.
zh: 成群的駱駝必遮蓋你的地， 米甸和以法的小駱駝要蓋滿你的國境； 示巴的人都必帶著黃金和乳香來到， 並且宣揚讚美耶和華的話。

en: All the flocks of Kedar shall be gathered to you; the rams of Nebaioth shall minister to you; they shall come up with acceptance on my altar, and I will beautify my beautiful house.
zh: 基達的羊群都必聚集到你那裡， 尼拜約的公羊要供你使用； 牠們必獻在我的祭壇上，成為蒙悅納的祭品。 我要榮耀我榮耀的殿。

en: Who are these that fly like a cloud, and like doves to their windows?
zh: 那些像雲彩飛來， 像鴿子飛回巢裡的，是誰呢？

en: For the coastlands shall hope for me, the ships of Tarshish first, to bring your children from afar, their silver and gold with them, for the name of the LORD your God, and for the Holy One of Israel, because he has made you beautiful.
zh: 眾海島的人都必等候我， 他施的船隊領先， 把你的眾子，連他們的金銀， 都一起從遠方帶來， 都為了耶和華你的 神的名， 又為了以色列的聖者的緣故，因為他已經榮耀了你。

en: Foreigners shall build up your walls, and their kings shall minister to you; for in my wrath I struck you, but in my favor I have had mercy on you.
zh: 外族人要重建你的城牆， 他們的君王都必服事你。 雖然我曾經在烈怒中擊打了你， 現在我卻在恩典中憐憫你。

en: Your gates shall be open continually; day and night they shall not be shut, that people may bring to you the wealth of the nations, with their kings led in procession.
zh: 你的城門必常常開， 日夜都不關閉， 使人把列國的財富帶來歸你， 他們的君王也都被引導而來。

en: For the nation and kingdom that will not serve you shall perish; those nations shall be utterly laid waste.
zh: 不事奉你的邦或國，都必滅亡； 那些邦國必全然荒廢。

en: The glory of Lebanon shall come to you, the cypress, the plane, and the pine, to beautify the place of my sanctuary, and I will make the place of my feet glorious.
zh: 黎巴嫩的榮耀必來歸你， 就是松樹、杉樹和黃楊樹，都一起歸你， 為要裝飾我聖所之地， 我也要使我踏足之處得榮耀。

en: The sons of those who afflicted you shall come bending low to you, and all who despised you shall bow down at your feet; they shall call you the City of the LORD, the Zion of the Holy One of Israel.
zh: 那些素來苦待你的人，他們的子孫都必屈身來到你那裡； 所有藐視你的，都要在你的腳下跪拜； 他們要稱你為耶和華的城、 以色列聖者的錫安。

en: Whereas you have been forsaken and hated, with no one passing through, I will make you majestic forever, a joy from age to age.
zh: 你曾經被撇棄、被憎恨， 以致無人經過你那裡， 但我要使你成為永遠被誇耀的， 成為萬代的喜樂。

en: You shall suck the milk of nations; you shall nurse at the breast of kings; and you shall know that I, the LORD, am your Savior and your Redeemer, the Mighty One of Jacob.
zh: 你要喝萬國的奶， 又吮列王的乳， 這樣，你就知道我耶和華是你的拯救者， 是你的救贖主，雅各的大能者。

en: Instead of bronze I will bring gold, and instead of iron I will bring silver; instead of wood, bronze, instead of stones, iron. I will make your overseers peace and your taskmasters righteousness.
zh: 我要帶來黃金代替銅， 帶來銀子代替鐵， 銅代替木頭， 鐵代替石頭。 我要立和平作你的官長， 立公義作你的監督。

en: Violence shall no more be heard in your land, devastation or destruction within your borders; you shall call your walls Salvation, and your gates Praise.
zh: 在你的國中必不再聽見強暴的事， 在你的境內，也不再聽到荒廢和毀壞的事； 你必稱你的城牆為“拯救”， 稱你的城門為“讚美”。

en: The sun shall be no more your light by day, nor for brightness shall the moon give you light; but the LORD will be your everlasting light, and your God will be your glory.
zh: 白天太陽必不再作你的光， 晚上月亮也必不再發光照耀你， 耶和華卻要作你永遠的光， 你的 神要作你的榮耀。

en: Your sun shall no more go down, nor your moon withdraw itself; for the LORD will be your everlasting light, and your days of mourning shall be ended.
zh: 你的太陽必不再下落， 你的月亮也必不退縮； 因為耶和華要作你永遠的光， 你悲哀的日子必要終止。

en: Your people shall all be righteous; they shall possess the land forever, the branch of my planting, the work of my hands, that I might be glorified.
zh: 你的人民都必成為義人， 永遠得地為業； 他們是我栽種的嫩芽， 我手所作的工作， 使我得榮耀。

en: The least one shall become a clan, and the smallest one a mighty nation; I am the LORD; in its time I will hasten it.
zh: 最小的要成為一族， 微弱的要成為強盛的國， 我耶和華必按著定期速速作成這事。
